name: Flexion Leg Sit-Up Stretch
shortDescription: A stretch that combines trunk flexion with leg movement to lengthen the abdominals and hip flexors.
instructions: Start lying on your back with knees bent. Flex your spine as you perform a sit-up, reaching toward your knees. Pause in the top position for a stretch before lowering back down.
steps: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor.
Cross arms over chest or reach toward knees.
Contract abdominal muscles to sit up, curling your spine.
Reach for your knees at the top to enhance the stretch.
Lower back to starting position with control.
breathing: Exhale as you sit up, inhale as you lower down.
